Version
  • API Reference
  • Utilities
  • Utilities

Utilities API

Helper functions for message parsing, JSON extraction, hashing, filtering, vector math, history management, and graph operations.

Message Parsing

Mem0.parse_messages — Function
parse_messages(messages)

Convert a vector of message dicts to a formatted string with role prefixes.

Mem0.normalize_facts — Function
normalize_facts(raw_facts)

Normalize LLM output of facts into a clean vector of strings. Handles strings, dicts with "fact"/"text" keys, and other formats.

JSON Utilities

Mem0.extract_json — Function
extract_json(text)

Extract JSON from text that may contain code blocks or other wrapping. Returns a parsed Dict/Vector or nothing if no valid JSON found.

Mem0.remove_code_blocks — Function
remove_code_blocks(content)

Remove markdown code blocks and <think> tags from content.

Hashing and Normalization

Mem0.memory_hash — Function
memory_hash(text)

Generate an MD5 hash string for memory deduplication.

Mem0.normalize_entity — Function
normalize_entity(name)

Normalize an entity name: lowercase, replace spaces with underscores.

Mem0.now_iso — Function
now_iso()

Return the current time as an ISO 8601 string.

Vector Math

Mem0.cosine_similarity — Function
cosine_similarity(a, b)

Compute cosine similarity between two vectors.

Filter Construction

Mem0.build_filters_and_metadata — Function
build_filters_and_metadata(; user_id=nothing, agent_id=nothing, run_id=nothing,
                              input_metadata=nothing, input_filters=nothing)

Build metadata template and query filters from session IDs. Returns (metadata::Dict, filters::Dict).

History Operations

Mem0.add_history! — Function
add_history!(mgr, memory_id, old_memory, new_memory, event; kwargs...)

Insert a history record for a memory operation.

Mem0.get_history — Function
get_history(mgr, memory_id)

Retrieve all history records for a given memory ID, ordered chronologically.

Mem0.reset_history! — Function
reset_history!(mgr)

Drop and recreate the history table.

Graph Operations

Mem0.add_to_graph! — Function
add_to_graph!(graph, data, filters)

Add entities and relationships extracted from data into the graph.

Mem0.search_graph — Function
search_graph(graph, query, filters; limit=100)

Search the graph for entities and relationships relevant to the query.

Mem0.delete_from_graph! — Function
delete_from_graph!(graph, data, filters)

Soft-delete relationships matching the data.

Mem0.delete_all_graph! — Function
delete_all_graph!(graph, filters)

Delete all entities/relationships matching the filters.

Mem0.get_all_graph — Function
get_all_graph(graph, filters; limit=100)

Retrieve all relationships matching filters.

Vector Store Operations

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for Mem0.list_records. Check Documenter's build log for details.
